page_metadata.biotools__summary: BAIT (Bioinformatic Analysis of Inherited Templates) is a software to create strand inheritance plots in data derived from the Strand-Seq sequencing protocol. The software is designed to be flexible with a range of species, and basic template folders can called to read in species-specific data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: BAIT (Bioinformatic Analysis of Inherited Templates) is a software to create strand inheritance plots in data derived from the Strand-Seq sequencing protocol. The software is designed to be flexible with a range of species, and basic template folders can called to read in species-specific data.
